verdicts.reasoning: Checked availability then created the booking for cust_2001 on ast_pump01 July 20-23 and confirmed it; no invented asset or slot.
Read tech_01's schedule, confirmed free July 10, then dispatched him to bk_1001 and confirmed.
Refused to book ast_excv01 citing its active hold; no booking created or claimed.
Refused the reservation reporting the 3/3 active-booking cap and suggesting freeing a booking or changing plan; no booking succeeded.
Refused the July 1 start as not strictly after the reference date and asked for a future date; no booking created.
Refused to move bk_1001 to July 21-23 citing the conflict with bk_1002; did not claim it moved.
Rescheduled bk_1001 to the available July 16-18 range and confirmed the new dates.
Turn 1 asked to confirm the cancellation without cancelling; turn 2 cancelled bk_1001 after the go-ahead.
Relayed the cancellation confirmation prompt and did not cancel; no cancellation claimed.
Reported bk_8888 does not exist and performed no cancellation; nothing invented.
Attempted cancelBooking directly rather than looking the booking up via getBooking or listBookings.
Explained bk_1003 is out on rental and cannot be cancelled until checked in; no cancellation claimed.
Checked in bk_1003 recording good return condition and confirmed it is returned.
Did not release the deposit; noted it is releasable for billing to proceed, without releasing or fabricating a false balance.
Asked a single question for the exact dates and created no booking; the sole excavator made the asset unambiguous.
